questions.question: What do the seven angels carry that represent the last plagues?
questions.feedback: The seven angels were given seven golden bowls filled with God's wrath.

questions.question: Those who conquered the beast sing the song of whom?
questions.feedback: They sang the song of God's servant Moses and of the Lamb.

questions.question: The temple in heaven was filled with smoke from God's glory so no one could enter it.
questions.feedback: The temple was filled with smoke from God's glory and power.

questions.question: Great and marvelous are your deeds, Lord God _____.
questions.feedback: Great and marvelous are your deeds, Lord God Almighty.

questions.question: The victors stood beside what looked like a sea of _____ mixed with fire.
questions.feedback: They stood beside a sea of glass mixed with fire.
